chapter_title.en: Reward of trimming one’s nails and moustache

text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص مَنْ قَلَّمَ أَظْفَارَهُ یَوْمَ السَّبْتِ أَوْ یَوْمَ الْخَمِیسِ وَ أَخَذَ مِنْ شَارِبِهِ عُوفِیَ مِنْ وَجَعِ الْأَضْرَاسِ وَ وَجَعِ الْعَیْنِ.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 2.  The Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) says, “One who trims his nails and  moustache  on  Thursday  or  Saturday  will  remain  safe from the pain of teeth and eyes.”
